zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth於1378年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾時，她的父親Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis23歲，母親Janet Mortimer of March20歲。她於1392年與Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie在蘇格蘭Forfarshire奧特豪斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth于1378年出生在苏格兰洛包爾时，她的父亲Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis23岁，母亲Janet Mortimer of March20岁。她于1392年与Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie在苏格兰Forfarshire奧特豪斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年在英国苏格兰安格斯奧特豪斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth was born in 1378, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, was 23 and her mother, Janet Mortimer of March, was 20. She married Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie in 1392, in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1441, in Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth est née en 1378, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Janet Mortimer of March, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie en 1392, à Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1441, à Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth 1378 in Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis 23 und ihre Mutter Janet Mortimer of March 20. Sie hat 1392 in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1441 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth è nata il nel 1378 nel Roxburghshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Janet Mortimer of March, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie nel 1392, nel Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1441, nel Auchterhouse, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 커크턴 프 오트하스
ko.lifeSummary: Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth(이)가 1378년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Mortimer of March(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1392년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 오트하스에서 Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 오트하스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Kirkton of Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland: кирктон оф аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet-nic-Andrew Gray of Broxmouth родилась в 1378 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Mortimer of March, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Ogilvy of Auchterhouse Earl of Airlie в 1392 г. в местности аучтироус, Forfarshire, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1441 г. в местности аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
